name: PivotMerge: Bridging Heterogeneous Multimodal Pre-training via Post-Alignment Model Merging

description: arXiv:2604.22823v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) rely on multimodal pre-training over diverse data sources, where different datasets often induce complementary cross-modal alignment capabilities. Model merging provides a cost-effective mechanism for integrating multiple expert MLLMs with complementary strengths into a unified model. However, exi...
author: Zibo Shao, Baochen Xiong, Xiaoshan Yang, Yaguang Song, Qimeng Zhang, Haifeng Chen, Changsheng Xu
